description_long: This is a large, rectangular chest of drawers with a distressed, weathered blue paint finish, giving it a rustic and vintage appearance. The front features fifteen drawers arranged in three rows of five, each with a small round knob handle. Areas of the paint are chipped and worn, revealing patches of brown wood underneath, especially at the corners and lower edges. The sides and back are plain, with the same blue finish and visible wear, but no additional features or hardware. The top surface is flat and broad, suitable for placing objects. The overall construction suggests it is made primarily of wood, with metal hardware for the handles.
description: A large, weathered blue chest of drawers with fifteen drawers and round knob handles, featuring distressed paint and exposed wood patches.
description_view_0: Front view showing all fifteen drawers with round knob handles and significant paint wear.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, distressed blue surface with chipped paint at the bottom corner.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, featureless blue back with some paint wear near the base.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible paint chipping at the lower edge and a hint of drawer knobs at the front edge.
